segments.text: We praise you, God, we praise you, for your Name is near; people tell of your wonderful deeds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I choose the appointed time; it is I who judge with equity.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When the earth and all its people quake, it is I who hold its pillars firm.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Boast no more, and to the wicked, Do not lift up your horns.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Do not lift your horns against heaven; do not speak so defiantly.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: No one from the east or the west or from the desert can exalt themselves.
It is God who judges: He brings one down, he exalts another.
In the hand of the Lord is a cup full of foaming wine mixed with spices; he pours it out, and all the wicked of the earth drink it down to its very dregs.
As for me, I will declare this forever; I will sing praise to the God of Jacob,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will cut off the horns of all the wicked, but the horns of the righteous will be lifted up.
segments.speaker: God
